zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedicta Vernon於1442年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，她的父親Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight22歲，母親Margaret de Swynfen24歲。她於1463年與Henry Foljambe Esq.在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年5月24日在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年58歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedicta Vernon于1442年出生在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight22岁，母亲Margaret de Swynfen24岁。她于1463年与Henry Foljambe Esq.在英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年5月24日在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年58岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Benedicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Benedicta Vernon was born in 1442, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight, was 22 and her mother, Margaret de Swynfen, was 24. She married Henry Foljambe Esq. in 1463, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 24 May 1500, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedicta Vernon est née en 1442, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Swynfen, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Foljambe Esq. en 1463, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1500, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedicta Vernon 1442 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Swynfen 24. Sie hat 1463 in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Henry Foljambe Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1500 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta Vernon è nata il nel 1442 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Swynfen, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Henry Foljambe Esq. nel 1463, nel Walton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1500, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Benedicta Vernonが1442年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knightは22歳，母Margaret de Swynfenは24歳であった。1463年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンでHenry Foljambe Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年5月24日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで58歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedicta Vernon(이)가 1442년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Swynfen(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 월턴에서 Henry Foljambe Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 5월 24일 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta Vernon nasceu em 1442, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Swynfen, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Foljambe Esq. em 1463, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1500, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedicta Vernon родилась в 1442 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Swynfen, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Foljambe Esq. в 1463 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 24 мая 1500 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedicta Vernon nació en 1442, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Vernon, IV, Knight, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret de Swynfen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Henry Foljambe Esq. en 1463, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1500, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
